headline: Interactive Brokers Expands Prediction Markets Push: What Does it Mean?
summary: IBKR debuts one interface for Kalshi, CME and ForecastEx prediction markets, letting clients compare contracts and route trades from a single screen.

headline: CME : Markets slide as G7 addresses geopolitical risks and trade.
summary: Bob Iaccino breaks down early morning market action as U.S. equities turn lower alongside mixed international economic data. He covers the latest G7 meeting discussions focusing on the Iran conflict,...

headline: The Fed will have to raise interest rates in July to appease 'bond vigilantes,' Yardeni says
summary: Sent to the Federal Reserve to lower interest rates, incoming Chair Kevin Warsh instead may have to push for higher levels.

headline: CME investigating an issue affecting Efix order entry via EBS workstation
